articles.title: Drake and Ann Michael Maye’s inaugural ‘MayeDay’ charity softball game is a big hit
articles.description:
"We’ve grown to love this place in a short amount of time.”

The post Drake and Ann Michael Maye’s inaugural ‘MayeDay’ charity softball game is a big hit appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Drake and Ann Michael Maye hosted the inaugural ‘MayeDay’ charity softball game in Boston.
The event raised significant funds for local charities, benefiting Boston communities.
Over 500 attendees participated, fostering community engagement and support for local initiatives.
